title: rubus hirtus var. subgutinensis
intro: Rubus hirtus var. subgutinensis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. subgutinensis include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
